meta.notice: Mapped records in this iteration are limited to public appearances, official public meetings, public ceremonies, official/host summit records, or clearly labelled secondary-source leads. No private addresses, hotels, hospitals, residences, leaked itineraries or inferred live routes are included.
meta.refreshModel: nightly source discovery, daily two-year backfill, 60-day announced-future scan, annual roster review
meta.safetyPrecision: city-level future defaults; past events remain city or public-venue level only when the venue is deliberately public
meta.status: real-source pilot mapped records plus top-200 roster queue
meta.name: ParleyMap
meta.iterationNote: v0.5.2 adds collision-aware date/location labels, separated route arcs, distinct blue past versus amber future map styling, and source-backed domestic India records for Narendra Modi.
